title: Job Opening Teacher at IL&FS Skills

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at IL&FS Skills
jsonLd.description:
Join the IL&FS Skills family as a Teacher in Delhi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IL&FS Skills:
IL&FS Skills is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
